task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
build for javascript backend
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is caller's id
  send back todos

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  todo_record = { title is todo's title, done is false, user_id is caller's id }
  saved = save todo_record to Todos
  send back saved with status 201
